add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF and attach a file using a FileAttachmentAnnotation with Aspose.Pdf.

embed-file-from-byte-array-pdf-attachmen.title: Embed File from Byte Array as PDF Attachment
embed-file-from-byte-array-pdf-attachmen.description: Demonstrates creating a FileSpecification from a byte array using a MemoryStream and adding it as a file attachment annotation to a PDF document.

add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Attachments to a PDF
add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed several files into an existing PDF by iterating a collection of file paths and saving the updated document.

set-attachment-description-mime-type.title: Set Attachment Description and MIME Type in PDF
set-attachment-description-mime-type.description: Shows how to loop through embedded file attachments in a PDF, assign a custom description and appropriate MIME type, and save the updated document.

add-attachment-to-pdf-and-save.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Save to Output Folder
add-attachment-to-pdf-and-save.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the resulting document to a specified output directory.

list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments with Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.description: The example opens a PDF, checks for embedded file attachments, and iterates through them to display each attachment's name and size in bytes.

extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Attachment from PDF
extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate an embedded file in a PDF by its name and save it to a target directory using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.title: Extract PDF Attachments to Separate Subfolders
extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its embedded files, and save each attachment into its own subfolder using reflection for version‑independent access.

remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.title: Remove PDF Attachment by Index
remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.description: Shows how to delete an embedded file (attachment) from a PDF using its zero‑based index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.title: Delete PDF Attachment by Filename
delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.description: Shows how to remove an embedded file from a PDF by matching its filename using Aspose.Pdf. The example loads a PDF, checks for the attachment, deletes it, and saves the result.

extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.title: Extract PDF Attachment Metadata to JSON
extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.description: Shows how to read file attachment annotations from a PDF, obtain their file name and creation date, and write the collected metadata to a JSON file.

update-attachment-description.title: Update Attachment Description in PDF
update-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to locate a file attachment annotation in a PDF, change its description, and save the updated document.

add-attachment-to-protected-pdf.title: Add Attachment to Password-Protected PDF
add-attachment-to-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a user password, embed a file as an attachment, and save the PDF while keeping its encryption intact.

extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from Encrypted PDF
extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypting it, and extracting all embedded file attachments to a specified folder.

add-attachments-with-size-validation.title: Add File Attachments with Size Validation to PDF
add-attachments-with-size-validation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, checking each file's existence and size against a limit, and adding valid files as attachment annotations to the document.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, attach a specified file to each document, and save the modified PDFs to an output directory using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.title: Batch Extract PDF Attachments into a ZIP Archive
batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files, extract their embedded attachments, and consolidate them into a single ZIP archive using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Attachments
create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf by adding a blank page, creating a collection, and attaching files via FileSpecification objects.

add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add a Word Document to a PDF Portfolio
add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed a Word (.docx) file into a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf's Document and FileSpecification classes.

insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Insert Excel Workbook into PDF Portfolio with Description
insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to create a PDF portfolio, embed an Excel workbook as an attachment, and set a custom description using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-image-in-pdf-portfolio.title: Embed Image as Attachment in PDF Portfolio
embed-image-in-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed an image file into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom display name using Aspose.Pdf.

add-pdf-to-existing-portfolio.title: Add PDF to Existing PDF Portfolio
add-pdf-to-existing-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file as a nested item inside an existing PDF Portfolio collection using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Multiple Files to PDF Portfolio
add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates creating an empty PDF and embedding various file types as a portfolio in a single loop using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-portfolio.title: Compress and Save PDF Portfolio
compress-pdf-portfolio.description: Loads an existing PDF Portfolio, enables object compression using OptimizationOptions, and saves the compressed file to a specified output path.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its embedded files, and write each file to a matching directory structure on disk.

extract-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
extract-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its embedded files collection, retrieve a file using a 1‑based index, and save it to disk with its original name and extension.

remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Remove Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its zero‑based collection index.

delete-pdf-outline-items-by-description.title: Delete PDF Outline Items by Description
delete-pdf-outline-items-by-description.description: The example loads a PDF, searches its outline (bookmark) entries for a specific description text, and removes the matching items, including nested outlines, before saving the cleaned document.

reorder-pdf-outline-items.title: Reorder PDF Outline (Bookmark) Items
reorder-pdf-outline-items.description: Demonstrates how to change the order of PDF bookmarks by extracting existing outline items, deleting the current collection, and re‑adding them in a custom sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.title: Apply Custom Visual Template to PDF Portfolio
apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.description: The example opens an existing PDF portfolio, iterates through each page, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Drawing Graph to overlay a light‑gray background rectangle and a blue header line, then saves the modified portfolio.

set-page-thumbnails.title: Set Page Thumbnails Using ThumbnailDevice
set-page-thumbnails.description: Creates a PDF, generates thumbnail images for each page using ThumbnailDevice, and assigns them as page thumbnails.

merge-pdf-portfolios-preserve-embedded-f.title: Merge PDF Portfolios and Preserve Embedded Files
merge-pdf-portfolios-preserve-embedded-f.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF portfolios into a single document while retaining all embedded files and document‑level metadata.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.description: Shows how to convert a regular PDF into a portfolio by embedding multiple files using Aspose.Pdf's collection and file specification features.

flatten-pdf-portfolio.title: Flatten PDF Portfolio to Standard PDF
flatten-pdf-portfolio.description: Loads a PDF Portfolio, removes its interactive collection features by flattening, and saves it as a regular PDF file.

read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.title: Read PDF Metadata and Count Attachments
read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract standard metadata fields, and determine the number of embedded file attachments.

generate-csv-report-pdf-attachments.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Attachments
generate-csv-report-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate embedded file attachments in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve each attachment's name, size, and description, and export the data to a CSV file.

add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add In-Memory Attachment to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF directly from a MemoryStream, avoiding any intermediate disk writes.

attach-remote-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Remote File to PDF as File Attachment
attach-remote-file-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates downloading a file from a URL into memory and embedding it in a PDF as a file‑attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while handling missing source PDF or attachment files and other processing errors.

validate-mime-type-add-attachment-to-pdf.title: Validate MIME Type and Add File Attachment to PDF
validate-mime-type-add-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to verify an attachment's MIME type against its file extension and embed the file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

measure-pdf-attachment-performance.title: Measure Performance of Adding, Extracting, and Removing PDF Attachments
measure-pdf-attachment-performance.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment annotation, extract the attached file, and remove the annotation while timing each operation for performance analysis using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-attachment-metadata-to-pdf.title: Embed File Attachment and Add Metadata to PDF
embed-attachment-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment in a PDF and store custom attachment metadata in the document information dictionary, then save the document with Aspose.Pdf.

add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Unicode File Attachment to PDF
add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file with a Unicode filename to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by creating a FileSpecification, setting its UnicodeName, and adding a FileAttachmentAnnotation to a page.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA‑256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its embedded files, extracts each attachment as a stream, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for integrity verification.

batch-watermark-pdf-attachments.title: Batch Watermark PDF Attachments
batch-watermark-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to iterate through embedded PDF attachments, apply an image watermark to every page of each attachment, and replace the attachment in the main PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry on Network Share
add-file-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF stored on a network share and implement a retry mechanism for transient I/O or permission errors.

extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.title: Extract PDF Attachments in Parallel
extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.description: Shows how to extract embedded file attachments from multiple PDF files concurrently, creating a separate output folder for each PDF.

verify-file-attachment-size.title: Verify File Attachment Increases PDF Size
verify-file-attachment-size.description: Creates a PDF, adds a file attachment annotation, and checks that the file size grows.

attachment-removal-integration-tests.title: Integration Tests for Attachment Removal
attachment-removal-integration-tests.description: Shows how to test that removing attachments from a ThreadMessageResponse correctly updates the Attachments collection count.

embed-attachment-metadata-hidden-annotat.title: Embed Attachment Metadata as Hidden XML Annotation
embed-attachment-metadata-hidden-annotat.description: The example extracts embedded file information from a PDF, serializes it to an XML document, and embeds that XML as a hidden file‑attachment annotation on the first page.
